title: Ability to turn on/off email notifications based on Work Status
excerpt: It would be wonderful if we could easily control email notifications based on work status. I don’t need to be flooded with email notifications while I am working in the Monday.com application. It’s built in App Notificat…

posts.author: zach_a_king (Zachary King)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be wonderful if we could easily control email notifications based on work status. I don’t need to be flooded with email notifications while I am working in the Monday.com application. It’s built in App Notifications are sufficient for that. But when I step away from my computer, that when email notifications are beneficial. So having a way to toggle them on and off, perhaps by the work status that is set or a simple toggle under our profile icon that we could slide off during working hours would significantly cut down on the noise. Thank you!
